subject: Restore older shell language
body: Prefer the older AppSidebar direction over the newer LiquidSidebar, then modernize it with better motion and keep the darker cyan/indigo palette instead of the current liquid-glass shell.

subject: Fix backend first
body: Add a public credits.charge mutation compatible with existing callers, improve error reporting in chat send flow, and replace the vault's stale diffing logic so typing and submit no longer duplicate or mangle letters.

subject: Sidebar direction confirmed
body: Older AppSidebar already matches the requested darker rail and cyan/indigo palette better than LiquidSidebar. Recommend swapping AppLayout back to AppSidebar and then refreshing motion/credits styling around that shell.

subject: Primary runtime bug identified
body: Chat send failure is caused by a missing public mutation: src/convex/chat.ts and src/convex/chatHelpers.ts both call credits.charge but src/convex/credits.ts has no exported charge mutation. Vault keystroke duplication risk comes from stale content-based diffing in useKeystrokes plus controlled textarea updates.
